stats.streak_bonus: Keep it up! {days} days to 1 week bonus.

dashboard.no_enrollments: You haven't enrolled in any courses yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.wallet_tooltip: Your wallet address is the permanent identifier for your account. Achievements, EXP, and course progress are bound to this address and cannot be transferred.
settings.role_info: account role not editable, reach to platform admin for role updation
settings.connect_wallet_prompt: Please connect your wallet to view settings.

linked_accounts.tooltip: Your wallet address is linked to this {provider}. This cannot be changed.

settings.delete_account_desc: You will lose access to the embedded wallet created for you by Superteam Academy. Any certificates or assets in that wallet will be permanently inaccessible. Your connected external wallets will remain yours.
settings.airdrop_tooltip: Devnet SOL is used to pay for transaction fees during enrollment and lessons. If your balance is low, you can request more from the official faucet.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.notify_updates_desc: Receive news about new courses and features.
preferences.notify_activity_desc: Receive updates about your progress and certificate status.
preferences.is_public_desc: Make your profile searchable on the leaderboard and visible to others.
preferences.data_export_desc: Download all your academy data (profile, enrollments, credentials, XP) in JSON format.

courses.title: Explore Curriculum
courses.subtitle: Master the Solana ecosystem one concept at a time. From Rust primitives to advanced anchor security.
courses.no_modules: No modules yet. Add modules and lessons in Course Studio.

lessons.next_lesson_cta: Great work! Continue to the next lesson to keep building.
lessons.course_complete_cta: Congratulations! You've completed all lessons in this course. 🎓
lessons.error_no_code: > error: no code provided. Please write some code first.

enrollment.sign_in_required: Sign in to access this lesson
enrollment.sign_in_info: You need to be signed in and enrolled in this course to view lesson content.
enrollment.enrollment_info: You need to enroll in this course before you can access its lessons.

footer.description: The ultimate learning platform for native Solana developers. Built by the community, for the community.
footer.ubuntu_quote: ubuntu - I am because we are.
footer.motivation: In this decentralized future, no one builds alone. Your growth is our growth, and your security is our collective strength.
footer.mission: lets strive towards development of safer/better blockchain
footer.newsletter_desc: Get the latest updates on new courses, challenges, and platform features.
footer.newsletter_error: Failed to subscribe. Please try again.
